caption: This video captures a large-scale virtual meeting featuring numerous participants in a grid of video feeds. The attendees are diverse in age and gender, mostly dressed in casual attire such as t-shirts and button-down shirts. Many participants are wearing headsets or headphones, and several are seen talking or listening attentively. The backgrounds vary, showing home offices with bookshelves, plain walls, and some outdoor settings. Legible names appear below some of the video feeds, including "Jerry Mihali," "Sravag Avellindo," "Jim Byrko," "Nagu Ceila," "Mira Jan van de Vyver," "Brance Pitton," "Siyat Laje," and "Aliem Khan." As the video progresses, there is subtle movement within the frames as participants shift in their seats, adjust their glasses, or speak, but the overall layout of the virtual gallery remains consistent throughout the sequence.
